scripts.build: pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/sdk build && pnpm --filter @trust-substrate/indexer build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-tests/packages/pi-extension/test/*.test.js
scripts.clean: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-tests', { recursive: true, force: true })"
